policy.publish_public_repo: Recorded in writing only; not enforced by application logic.
policy.sell_or_bundle_commercially: Recorded in writing only; not enforced by application logic.
policy.private_use: Recorded in writing only; not enforced by application logic.

packaged_datasets.name: Berean Study Bible
packaged_datasets.required_attribution: none required by license notice; attribution retained for clarity
packaged_datasets.notes: Berean Bible states the Berean Bible and Majority Bible texts were placed into the public domain as of 2023-04-30.

packaged_datasets.name: World English Bible
packaged_datasets.required_attribution: none required by copyright notice; keep trademark/change notice
packaged_datasets.notes: eBible states the WEB text is public domain and may be copied, distributed, and sold. Changed text should not be called World English Bible.

packaged_datasets.name: King James Version
packaged_datasets.required_attribution: none for United States public-domain use
packaged_datasets.notes: Public domain in the United States. UK publication/distribution may be subject to Crown/prerogative restrictions and should be reviewed separately.

packaged_datasets.name: American Standard Version
packaged_datasets.required_attribution: none for United States public-domain use
packaged_datasets.notes: Historical 1901 English translation.

packaged_datasets.name: English Revised Version
packaged_datasets.required_attribution: none for United States public-domain use
packaged_datasets.notes: Historical 1881-1885 English translation.

packaged_datasets.name: BSB Strong's overlay mappings
packaged_datasets.required_attribution: Keep provenance notes in this file for reference.
packaged_datasets.notes: Restored for private reader functionality. Overlay was generated from local extracted study data; Bible Hub terms reserve rights and require prior written consent for commercial use of site content. Licensing notes are retained as a written record and are not runtime-enforced.

packaged_datasets.name: Hebrew Strong's/BDB-style lexicon chunks
packaged_datasets.required_attribution: Keep provenance notes in this file for reference.
packaged_datasets.notes: Contains Strong's/BDB-style material generated from local extracted study data. Underlying historical works may be public domain in the United States, but this extracted aggregation/source path is not cleared for public redistribution or sale. Licensing notes are retained as a written record and are not runtime-enforced.

packaged_datasets.name: Greek Strong's/Thayer-style lexicon chunks
packaged_datasets.required_attribution: Keep provenance notes in this file for reference.
packaged_datasets.notes: Contains Strong's/Thayer-style material generated from local extracted study data. Underlying historical works may be public domain in the United States, but this extracted aggregation/source path is not cleared for public redistribution or sale. Licensing notes are retained as a written record and are not runtime-enforced.
